overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a morning walk through the urban streets of Los Santos. The clip begins at a commercial intersection with a taco restaurant and billboard, proceeds along palm-lined sidewalks past modern buildings, crosses a busy intersection with traffic, and continues along the opposite sidewalk passing a city transit bus.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunny urban intersection featuring a colorful taco restaurant and large overhead billboard. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk past a modern black building with a parked white sports car, continuing past palm trees and utility poles in a sparse commercial area.

slowing pace while approaching traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk approaching a busy traffic intersection

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving along the street toward the intersection

segments.scene_description: Walking past multi-story apartment buildings on the left, the scene transitions toward a busy intersection. The camera approaches a traffic light pole while vehicles including a black SUV move through the crossing ahead. The green commercial building becomes more prominent on the right as the taco shop recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with transit bus and crosswalk

events.description: stepping into crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
Los Santos Transit bus passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: Los Santos Transit city bus stopped at the traffic light
black sedan waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: white and blue Los Santos Transit public bus
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide intersection crosswalk, transitioning from sidewalk to asphalt crossing. A Los Santos Transit bus dominates the right side while various vehicles wait at the traffic lights. The perspective shifts as the camera crosses, with the green commercial building moving from right to left in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with office buildings and mature street trees

events.description: reaching the opposite sidewalk after crossing the intersection
passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a brick office building and bus stop area

notable_agents.action: person in brown jacket walking opposite direction on sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story building with red brick facade and small rectangular windows
mature trees with dense green foliage providing shade
red and white sign reading Do Not Park Here

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera continues along a tree-lined sidewalk featuring a brick office building on the right. The city bus recedes into the distance while the camera passes a pedestrian in a brown jacket. Mature street trees provide shade as the walk continues past a no parking sign and utility poles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sunny urban commercial district that transitions from a sparse intersection into a denser, tree-lined city street. It begins at a colorful taco restaurant beneath a large billboard, moving along a concrete sidewalk past a modern black building and a parked white sports car. As the camera proceeds past multi-story apartments, the scene shifts toward a busy intersection where a black SUV and other vehicles navigate the crossing. The perspective then transitions from the sidewalk to the asphalt of a wide crosswalk, passing a prominent Los Santos Transit bus as the surrounding commercial buildings shift across the frame. Finally, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk, moving past a pedestrian in a brown jacket and a brick office building under the shade of mature street trees.
